name: Danish Ableskivers
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Whole wheat flour (or 1-1/2 cups all purpose flour)
2 Bananas (or 1 small can of peaches, well drained) - optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
2. Mix egg yolks and milk together well.
3. Add this mixture to the dry ingredients. Stir until just blended.
4. Beat egg whites until stiff and fold them into batter.
5. Heat aebleskiver pan.
6. Spoon 1/2 teaspoon oil into each section and fill about 2/3 full with batter.
7. Cook over medium heat until bubbles appear, then turn with a fork or skewer.
8. Continue cooking the other side until lightly browned.
9. To vary flavor, add a slice of banana or peach to each section before it is turned.
10. Dust with powdered sugar and serve with butter and jam or syrup. Makes about 28 aebleskivers.
